overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character in a studded leather jacket exploring a rainy night-time urban environment. The character begins at a homeless encampment with a tent and fire barrel, then walks through a park and continues along wet city streets with vehicles and occasional pedestrians.

character turns away from the tent to exit the encampment

seated by the tent entrance looking toward the fire

metal barrel with burning fire providing warm orange light
tall dense bushes with autumn foliage surrounding the encampment
tall dense bushes with autumn foliage surrounding the encampment
trees with autumn foliage in the background

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a homeless encampment in a park at night, where a camouflage tent and fire barrel are set up among bushes. Two individuals sit near the warmth of the fire. The character circles the encampment observing the scene before turning to leave.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park with monument and autumn trees

events.description: exits the encampment area into open park space
approaches the park exit toward the city street

agents.ego_description: walks away from the encampment through the park toward the city street

entered.detail: tall stone monument or memorial structure on pedestal
large stone pillars marking the park exit gateway
cobblestone pathway leading from park to street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the encampment, the character walks through an open park area with autumn trees and a stone monument visible in the distance. The character heads toward stone pillars marking the park exit, transitioning from grass to cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone sidewalk along city street with stone walls

events.description: exits park onto city sidewalk next to street with vehicle traffic
white van drives past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walks along the wet cobblestone sidewalk beside the street with vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the wet street

entered.detail: tall stone wall with graffiti running along the sidewalk
ornate black street lamps illuminating the wet sidewalk
tall modern buildings with lit windows in the background

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wet cobblestone sidewalk next to a city street. A stone wall with graffiti runs along the right side while vehicles including a white van pass on the left. Street lamps cast reflections on the rain-soaked pavement as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection and narrow street with graffiti

agents.ego_description: crosses the street and continues through urban streets, passing other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with checkered umbrella walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
person holding a checkered umbrella walking in the rain

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet asphalt street at an intersection, passing walls covered in graffiti. Other pedestrians with umbrellas appear as the character moves into a narrower urban street lined with brick buildings and storefront lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded homeless encampment in a park to a bustling, rain-soaked urban street. It begins by circling a camouflage tent and a glowing fire barrel where two people seek warmth among the bushes, before the character turns away to traverse an open park area filled with autumn trees and a distant stone monument. As the character passes through stone pillars marking the park exit, the terrain shifts from grass to a wet cobblestone sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and passing vehicles. The scene then expands as the character crosses a rain-slicked asphalt intersection, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas and into a narrower city street defined by brick buildings and the glow of storefront lights.
